_comment: Bundled sample inbox (plan §6.1). ~20 realistic pre-scored demo rows shown on the very first run, BEFORE anything is connected, so the aha (a scored, location-clean inbox with Score-vs-Fit) lands in seconds. Read-only: these never enter the tracker DB and are hidden the moment a real inbox exists. Score = the free local scorer's 0-100; fit = a demo BYO-AI grade (A/B/C shown as 95/80/65) to demonstrate the Score-vs-Fit split. Fields span the tested personas + varied locations. Purely illustrative content; no real postings.

rows.title: Software Engineer II
rows.description: Backend services in Go and Python. You'll own a service end to end and mentor one junior engineer. Hybrid, 2 days in office.
rows.fit_why: Strong title + stack match; salary well above your floor; in your metro.

rows.title: Senior Software Engineer
rows.description: Lead a platform team. 8+ years required. Heavy on-call. Staff-track.
rows.fit_why: Good pay but a level above you (Senior/8+ yrs) — the free Score is high, but Fit flags the seniority gap.

rows.title: Registered Nurse - Med/Surg
rows.description: Full-time RN, day shift, med/surg unit. BSN preferred. Sign-on bonus.
rows.fit_why: Exact role + local + hourly pay annualizes above your floor.

rows.title: Travel Nurse (13-week)
rows.description: Contract travel assignments across multiple states. Housing stipend.
rows.fit_why: Real nursing role but not local and contract-only — Score rewards the title, Fit down-weights the travel/temp nature.

rows.title: Mechanical Engineer
rows.description: Design mechanical systems for industrial equipment. SolidWorks, GD&T, tolerance stack-ups.
rows.fit_why: Direct field + local + CAD skills you have.

rows.title: Design Engineer (Entry)
rows.description: Entry-level mechanical design. New grads welcome. On-site.
rows.fit_why: Entry-level and nearby; slightly below your ideal comp so Fit is a B.

rows.title: Controls Engineer
rows.description: PLC/HMI programming (Allen-Bradley), SCADA, panel design. Travel to customer sites ~20%.
rows.fit_why: Controls role in your metro with the exact PLC stack.

rows.title: Automation Technician
rows.description: Maintain and troubleshoot automated lines. Associate degree or equivalent.
rows.fit_why: Adjacent hands-on role, below your target level — Score sees the automation match, Fit sees the level mismatch.

rows.title: Data Analyst
rows.description: SQL, dashboards, stakeholder reporting. Entry-to-mid. Hybrid.
rows.fit_why: On-field, entry-friendly, local, comp above floor.

rows.title: Senior Data Scientist
rows.description: PhD or 6+ years. Deep ML research. Publications a plus.
rows.fit_why: Same vertical but a senior/research role beyond a career-changer's level — a clear Score-vs-Fit divergence.

rows.title: Management Consultant
rows.description: Strategy engagements for mid-market clients. Travel Mon-Thu.
rows.fit_why: Squarely consulting, local hub, strong comp.

rows.title: Engagement Manager (AWS Practice)
rows.description: Own delivery of cloud migration projects. AWS certifications required.
rows.fit_why: Shares the 'engagement manager' title family but it's a technical delivery role, not management consulting — the free Score is fooled; Fit isn't.

rows.title: Digital Marketing Manager
rows.description: Own paid + lifecycle marketing. Remote-first, US hours.
rows.fit_why: Real remote marketing role in the US — location-clean and on-field.

rows.title: Growth Marketing Lead
rows.description: Demand generation for a European health tech. EU work authorization required.
rows.fit_why: Marketing match but region-locked to Europe and below a US floor — Fit catches what a naive 'remote' Score misses.

rows.title: Warehouse Associate
rows.description: Pick/pack/ship, forklift certification a plus. Multiple shifts. On-site.
rows.fit_why: Exact on-site role, local, hourly pay meets floor.

rows.title: Forklift Operator
rows.description: Certified forklift operator for a 3PL distribution center. Night shift.
rows.fit_why: Local warehouse role; night shift knocks Fit to a B.

rows.title: High School Math Teacher
rows.description: 9th-12th grade mathematics. Ohio teaching license required. 2026-27 school year.
rows.fit_why: Exact K-12 role in a local district — the kind of posting free tech feeds miss.

rows.title: Substitute Teacher (On-Call)
rows.description: Day-to-day substitute across districts. Substitute license required.
rows.fit_why: Local and in-field but on-call/day-rate — Score rewards the education match, Fit reflects the temp nature.

rows.title: Staff Accountant
rows.description: Month-end close, reconciliations, GAAP. CPA track. Hybrid.
rows.fit_why: Solid accounting fit locally; comp is a touch below ideal so Fit is a B.

rows.title: HVAC Technician
rows.description: Residential and light commercial HVAC install/repair. EPA 608 required. Company van.
rows.fit_why: Local trades role with a clear pay range; a strong B on Fit.
